summary: TAREA 2 Roadmap - Oleada 1 Autonomía Agentes + Kill-Switch Global COMPLETO. 6/6 tests oleada1_autonomia pasados, 14/15 fase4 pasados (1 skipped), 8/8 chatbot pasados. Kill-switch funciona correctamente: pause-all detiene 6 tareas, resume-all las restaura. Frontend KillSwitchControl con dialog de confirmación verificado. Badge AUTO en timeline para acciones del scheduler verificado (32 badges encontrados). Variable MCP_FAILURE_NOTIFY_EMAIL=ramirez91@gmail.com configurada correctamente.

issues: WebSocket connection warnings (non-blocking) - 'WebSocket is closed before the connection is established'

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/agents/autonomy/status - Devuelve {paused, paused_at, paused_by, reason, tasks_activas, tasks_pausadas} - VERIFIED
POST /api/agents/autonomy/pause-all - Solo master puede activar (require_master) - VERIFIED
POST /api/agents/autonomy/resume-all - Solo master puede reanudar - VERIFIED
Snapshot de tareas pausadas guardado para restauración - VERIFIED
Audit logs con tool='_kill_switch_activated' y '_kill_switch_resumed' - VERIFIED

4 tareas Oleada 1 sembradas: kpi_analyst.obtener_dashboard '0 8 * * *', auditor.ejecutar_audit_operacional '0 22 * * *', auditor.generar_audit_report '0 9 * * 1', iso_officer.generar_revision_direccion '0 6 1 * *' - VERIFIED
Frontend btn-pausa-emergencia-global visible y funcional - VERIFIED
Frontend dialog-pausa-emergencia con input-motivo-pausa y btn-confirmar-pausa-emergencia - VERIFIED
Frontend btn-resume-autonomia-global con animate-pulse y color destructive - VERIFIED
Frontend badge-automatico (AUTO) en timeline para acciones del scheduler - VERIFIED (32 badges encontrados)
NOTIFY_EMAIL en scheduler.py usa MCP_FAILURE_NOTIFY_EMAIL - VERIFIED

success_rate.frontend: 100% (kill-switch dialog, pause/resume cycle, AUTO badges all verified)
